text: - 1.9.1 Subcontractor shall be responsible for the protection of work areas where a fall hazard exists (i.e.: any leading edge, floor openings, open trenches, excavations, holes, and disturbed areas) created in the process of executing this Scope of Work from both pedestrians and vehicular traffic. Subcontractor shall provide and maintain signage, warning lights, fencing, barricades, and other such safety devices to protect its work areas.
